title: Happy Ghastling!
description: Changes the name of the Happy Ghast to Ghastling.
body:
This small resourcepack changes the name of the Happy Ghast to "Ghastling".



It also renames the Happy Ghast spawn egg to "Ghastling Spawn Egg" and all other references to the Happy Ghast in the game, introduced in the Chase The Skies update in 1.21.6.

# **MY OTHER PACKS**

- [Ancient Copper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ancient-copper)

- [all lowercase](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sas-all-lowercase)
